acceptance_criteria: 创建 ILandlordLeaseService 接口（ITransient）
实现 LandlordLeaseService（GetByRoomId/Add/Edit/Remove）

API 路由：/api/landlord-lease/*
端点：room/{roomId}(GET)、add(POST)、edit(PUT)、remove/{id}(DELETE)
dotnet build 编译成功

implementation_steps.code_hint: interface ILandlordLeaseService : ITransient — Task<LandlordLeaseDto?> GetByRoomIdAsync(int roomId), Task<LandlordLeaseDto> AddAsync(CreateLandlordLeaseInput), Task<LandlordLeaseDto> EditAsync(UpdateLandlordLeaseInput), Task RemoveAsync(int id)
注入 IRepository<LandlordLease> + IRepository<Room>；GetByRoomId 含 Include.Room.Community；AddAsync 含房间存在+一对一约束+日期校验；EditAsync 含日期校验+逐字段更新；RemoveAsync 含存在校验
[Route("api/landlord-lease")] [Authorize] public class LandlordLeaseAppService : IDynamicApiController — GetByRoomId(GET room/{roomId}), Add(POST add), Edit(PUT edit), Remove(DELETE remove/{id})

minor_issues: EditAsync 逐字段更新可读性可提升（但与 RoomService/TenantService 模式一致）

implementation_steps.code_hint: OnModelCreating 中新增: modelBuilder.Entity<Room>().HasOne(r => r.LandlordLease).WithOne(l => l.Room).HasForeignKey<LandlordLease>(l => l.RoomId).OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade)
